title: Tech Mahindra Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Tech Mahindra Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Tech Mahindra Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Vadodara office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tech Mahindra Holdings Services:
Tech Mahindra Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tech Mahindra Holdings Services!
